title: Transcriptomics, single-cell sequencing and spatial sequencing-based studies of cerebral ischemia.
author: Liu J Qing T He M Xu L Wu Z Huang M Liu Z Zhang Y Li Z Yang W Liu J Li J
content: S-EPMC12020253 PMC12020253 Transcriptomics, single-cell sequencing and spatial sequencing-based studies of cerebral ischemia. With high disability and mortality rate as well as highly complex pathogenesis, cerebral ischemia is highly morbid, prone to recurrence. To comprehensively understand
